reasoning: The control IA-5(17) focuses on presentation attack detection for biometric authentication, which is specific to identity management systems that handle biometric data. Kubernetes does not inherently manage biometric authentication or presentation attack detection as it is primarily focused on container orchestration and does not provide native biometric authentication capabilities. Therefore, this control is not applicable to Kubernetes security architecture.
title: Authenticator Management - Authenticator management | presentation attack detection for biometric authentic
